title: wormia papyracea
intro: Wormia papyracea, also known as Chinese Parasol, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. The medicinal properties of Wormia papyracea lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and as an antimalarial agent. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria. Wormia papyracea is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture for medicinal use, which can be consumed orally to reap its health benefits.
